author: y4rr
content: Deferred — no Apple hardware on test box. Sprint C.7 landed MtlBackend scaffold + 10 highest-priority MSL kernels (commit eaa20c0f). Implementation per torch.mps spec is well-documented; live verification + remaining ~70 GpuBackend method MSL bodies awaits Apple Silicon hardware in CI. Tracking preserved here; close to keep the active queue focused.
